coverage.summary: Coverage is strongest on seeded findings, evidence notes, replay docs, trace outputs, route mapping, and the demo artifact consistency gate.

findings.title: Launch export bundle preserves a credential-shaped preview in shared evidence
Admin utilities reference a redacted service alias with broad operational scope
Project detail handles make a tenant-scope review feel necessary
Launch relay scenario models missing signature and replay defenses
Persona switch mirrors a legacy trust-by-email session shortcut
Generated filter fragment would need review before entering the data layer
Browser-visible runtime labels and permissive preview notes broaden exposure review

evidence.note: Deterministic canonical source for all seeded scenarios.
Operational summaries from specialist agents with status transitions and verification outcomes.
Safe diff-style patch guidance that reinforces remediation feel.
Replay-ready pass criteria and regression classification for each scenario.
Machine-checkable guard that confirms the manifest, traces, scores, replay data, and docs all agree before demo time.

partial: Auth/session trust validation in a no-auth runtime
Access-control proof without a real tenant backend
Config/CORS narrative without live network policies

replay_ready_notes: Every seeded finding maps to a replay note, patch diff, and evidence summary.
The bundle can be narrated from the admin audit room without leaving the repo.
Replay entries are safe and descriptive; they never invoke a real attack path.
npm run verify:demo confirms the artifact layer stays internally consistent before stage time.
